understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal-only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT); after each horizontal input the player falls automatically in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile or hitting a hazard. CLICK removes breakable (`x`) tiles. Hazards like spikes (`u`/`v`) end the run instantly if landed on. UNDO reverts the last action. Each attempt is limited to 50 turns.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal-only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT); after each horizontal input the player falls automatically in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile or hitting a hazard. CLICK removes breakable (`x`) tiles. Hazards like spikes (`u`/`v`) end the run instantly if landed on. UNDO reverts the last action. Each attempt is limited to 50 turns.
